metricDefinitions.committed_StoryPoints: Sum of story points for issues present at sprint start; issues added during the sprint are excluded.
metricDefinitions.completed_StoryPoints: Sum of story points for issues completed during the sprint.
metricDefinitions.addedIntraSprint_StoryPoints: Sum of story points for issues added during the sprint.
metricDefinitions.removedInSprint_StoryPoints: Sum of story points removed from the sprint during execution.
metricDefinitions.spilledOver_StoryPoints: Sum of story points not completed at sprint close.
